objective: Add a local, host-mediated semantic candidate review gate that validates review artifacts, exposes semantic state in review packets, and blocks acceptance or apply only when semantic evidence requires it without granting authority.
implemented_behaviors: semantic_candidate_review validates fixture, candidate_id, candidate_hash, verdict, reviewed artifacts, and artifact hashes for local semantic review JSON.
Stale reviewed artifact hashes produce invalid_or_stale semantic state with reviewed_artifact_stale blocking evidence.
Unknown candidate ids and candidate hash mismatches produce invalid_or_stale semantic state.
Semantic review artifacts containing apply authority or operation-generating fields are invalid and cannot grant apply authority.
Missing semantic review is non-blocking for pure mechanical coordinate-only candidates with no semantic risks, no locked invariants, and no required spec setting.
Semantic risks, locked invariants, explicit semantic_review_required config, non-mechanical candidates, malformed spec.yaml, and symlinked spec.yaml fail closed and require semantic review.
Explicit semantic review verdicts needs_human and semantic_risk block acceptance/apply even when the review was optional before the artifact existed.
candidate_review_packet exposes semantic_invariant_report from the validator instead of a hardcoded not_run state.
candidate_acceptance.build_apply_readiness suppresses accept/apply commands when semantic_review blocks apply.
candidate_apply.apply_candidate checks semantic review state before mutation and returns blocked diagnostics before writing source changes.
Semantic pass never weakens deterministic apply readiness and never changes effective apply authority.

tests.red_result_before_implementation: error during collection: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'semantic_candidate_review'
4 failed, 7 passed; packet still returned hardcoded semantic_invariant_report and one fixture setup issue was corrected before implementation

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_candidate_acceptance.py tests/test_candidate_apply.py tests/test_candidate_review_packet.py -q
tests.red_result_after_initial_review: 3 failed, 32 passed; semantic blockers were not enforced in readiness/apply and malformed spec failed open
tests.green_result_after_review_fixes: included in final focused suite: 50 passed

tests.red_result_after_symlink_review: 1 failed, 12 passed; broken spec.yaml symlink failed open
tests.green_result_after_symlink_fix: included in final focused suite: 50 passed

tests.red_result_after_final_review: 2 failed, 16 passed; explicit optional semantic_risk verdict did not block apply/readiness
tests.green_result_after_final_fix: included in final focused suite: 50 passed

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_candidate_acceptance.py tests/test_candidate_apply.py tests/test_candidate_review_packet.py tests/test_semantic_candidate_review.py tests/test_semantic_contracts.py -q

uv run ruff check scripts/semantic_candidate_review.py scripts/candidates/candidate_review_packet.py scripts/candidates/candidate_acceptance.py scripts/candidates/candidate_apply.py tests/test_semantic_candidate_review.py tests/test_candidate_review_packet.py tests/test_candidate_acceptance.py tests/test_candidate_apply.py
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/semantic_candidate_review.py scripts/candidates/candidate_review_packet.py scripts/candidates/candidate_acceptance.py scripts/candidates/candidate_apply.py

initial_findings: Required semantic-review blockers were visible in packets but not enforced by acceptance/apply readiness.
Malformed or unreadable spec.yaml silently disabled locked-invariant requirements.
second_findings: Broken symlink spec.yaml still failed open.
third_findings: Optional candidates could still apply after a valid semantic review verdict of semantic_risk or needs_human.
adversarial_verification.summary: Final re-review reported no remaining Phase 6 blockers and confirmed semantic state validation, packet integration, stale hash invalidation, candidate mismatch invalidation, semantic-risk blocking, fail-closed spec handling, authority non-override, no external calls, and no fixture source mutation before the semantic gate.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.

New semantic_candidate_review.py is under the 200 pure-LOC healthy threshold. Existing candidate_review_packet.py remains oversized and was already above the strict 250 pure-LOC threshold before Phase 6.
